assertions.reason: CI includes distinct lint, vitest, pytest, and playwright validation layers as separate workflow/job identities.
evidence: .github/workflows/test.yml: jobs vitest/pytest/playwright run ci:vitest, ci:pytest, ci:playwright
gh run view 22625800357: jobs named vitest, pytest, playwright all completed success
gh run view 22625800355: separate Lint workflow exists for lint layer

assertions.reason: Local command matrix mirrors CI semantics with explicit script/service mappings for all required layers.
evidence: package.json scripts: ci:lint, ci:vitest, ci:pytest, ci:playwright, ci:full
.factory/services.yaml commands map lint/test_vitest/test_pytest/test_playwright to same ci:* scripts
Local runs: bun run ci:lint (exit 0), bun run ci:vitest (11 files/196 tests passed), bun run ci:pytest (341 passed, 43 skipped)
Local invocation exists for bun run ci:playwright (command executed; environment conflict captured separately)

assertions.reason: Gate wiring is fail-closed: no masking patterns found, and a failing required job marks its workflow failed.
evidence: Grep in .github/workflows for 'continue-on-error|\|\| true': no matches
gh run view 22625800355: workflow conclusion=failure because job lint-python failed
gh run view 22625800355: sibling job lint succeeded but workflow still failed

assertions.reason: Environment contract is consistent on approved mission ports and readiness assumptions across service/config layers.
evidence: Mission AGENTS.md requires backend 3100 and frontend 3101
.factory/services.yaml defines backend port 3100 and frontend port 3101 with healthchecks on 127.0.0.1
playwright.config.ts uses localhost:3100 and localhost:3101 with webServer startup commands on same ports
.factory/library/user-testing.md setup requires 3100/3101 and curl readiness checks

assertions.reason: A full successful local confidence-stack run could not be validated because Playwright requires exclusive 3100/3101 ownership and those ports were already occupied by existing shared processes.
evidence: bun run ci:full progressed through lint/vitest/pytest then failed at playwright with: 'http://localhost:3100/ is already used'
bun run ci:playwright failed with same port-occupied error
lsof -iTCP:3100 -sTCP:LISTEN and lsof -iTCP:3101 -sTCP:LISTEN showed active listeners before Playwright start
playwright.config.ts sets webServer reuseExistingServer:false for both services

frictions: Local Playwright gate cannot execute when mission ports are already occupied by other active workers because webServer reuseExistingServer is false; this interrupted local full-stack reproducibility validation.
blockers: Shared environment port occupancy on 3100/3101 prevented completion of a successful local bun run ci:full execution for VAL-CROSS-006.
notes: Validated only assigned assertions (VAL-GATE-001/002/003, VAL-CROSS-005/006) on CLI surface within mission boundaries (ports 3100/3101, no Docker). Account flow-validator-core@local and namespace ns-gate-core were respected; no production/business logic changes were made.
